title: Une femme dans la nuit
writer: Jean Bernard-Luc, Jacques Companéez, Pierre Laroche
actors: Viviane Romance, Georges Flamant, Claude Dauphin
plot: A theater troupe is touring Manon Lescaut, starring Denise, whose husband is a sick alcoholic. Tired of his violent outbursts, and wanting to rebuild her life, she runs away and finds refuge with a doctor who hires her as a nurse ...
